compress_video.seo.title: FileYuzu — Free Online Video Compressor
compress_video.seo.description: Compress MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM videos online with FileYuzu. Reduce video file size privately in your browser with no upload and no sign-up.
compress_video.hero.title: Free Online Video Compressor
compress_video.hero.description: Reduce video file size online — no upload, no sign-up. Runs entirely in your browser. Supports MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM.
compress_video.upload.title: Drop a video file here
compress_video.upload.subtitle: MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM · up to 500 MB
compress_video.upload.hint: Select one video file to compress
compress_video.how_to_use.title: How to Compress a Video Online
compress_video.how_to_use.steps: Upload a video file from your device or drag and drop it onto the upload area.
Choose a compression preset or set a custom target file size. Use the quick-select tags for common platforms like Gmail, Discord, or Slack.
Click Compress and wait a moment. All processing runs locally in your browser — your file is never sent to any server. Download when done.

compress_video.faq.title: Video Compressor FAQ

compress_video.faq.items.q: Is my video uploaded to a server?
compress_video.faq.items.a: No. All compression is done locally using FFmpeg.wasm (WebAssembly). Your video file never leaves your device.
We support MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM, and most other common formats. Output is always MP4 for maximum device compatibility.

compress_video.faq.items.q: What is the maximum file size?
compress_video.faq.items.a: The video can be up to 500 MB. For larger files, consider splitting the video first or using a desktop tool like HandBrake.

compress_video.faq.items.q: What do the Low, Balance, and High presets mean?
compress_video.faq.items.a: Balance reduces size by around 60–80% while keeping the video looking good on most screens. Low produces the smallest file with more visible quality loss. High keeps near-original quality with moderate reduction.
It strips the audio track from the compressed video. Useful for mute clips, screen recordings, or when you need the smallest possible file size.

compress_video.faq.items.q: Why do the platform tags show specific MB values?
compress_video.faq.items.a: Each platform has an attachment size limit. Gmail is 25 MB, Discord 8 MB (free), Slack 100 MB, and so on. Clicking a tag sets the target size automatically.

compress_video.faq.items.q: Will there be a visible quality drop?
compress_video.faq.items.a: It depends on the preset and original video. For most videos, the Balance preset produces output that looks fine on phones and standard screens. You can try a different preset if you are not satisfied.
